name: base_geometry
label: Base Geometry
description: Tune the JustinSDK plate and crown before adding the assembly helpers

name: hex_radius
description: Hexagon radius used by the plate

name: hex_spacing
description: Spacing between hex cells in the plate

name: hex_count
description: Number of concentric hex rings in the base plate

name: plate_height
description: Extrusion height of the plate

name: crown_outer_radius
description: Outer radius of the JustinSDK crown

name: crown_inner_radius
description: Inner radius of the crown profile

name: crown_points
description: Point count used by the crown profile

name: crown_height
description: Height parameter for the starburst crown

name: support_controls
label: NopSCAD Support
description: Optional rounded support imported from NopSCAD

name: show_support
description: Include the rounded NopSCAD support

name: support_offset_xyz
description: Position of the rounded support

name: support_roundover
description: Roundover amount for the support cylinder

name: support_radius
description: Radius parameter for the support cylinder

name: support_chamfer
description: Chamfer parameter for the support cylinder

name: marker_controls
label: Marker Sphere
description: Optional JSCAD marker used to highlight the mixed-library assembly

name: show_marker
description: Include the marker sphere

name: marker_offset_xyz
description: Position of the marker sphere

name: marker_radius
description: Radius of the marker sphere

name: presentation_controls
label: Presentation
description: Final transforms applied to the complete assembly

name: display_scale
description: Scale the final assembly uniformly

name: yaw_deg
description: Rotate the final assembly around the Z axis
